description: BUUU Group Limited, through its subsidiaries, provides design, planning and production of face-to-face event in Hong Kong. The company operates through Event Management and Stage Production segments. The company curates and manages a range of events, including cultural, artistic, recreational, and corporate promotions. It also offers event management services, such as design and planning, project management, and on-site supervision.
